videos.title: CHINA BANS BITCOIN AGAIN
videos.text: please always remember this that when you invest in cryptocurrencies especially bitcoin you are not investing it as a medium of exchange you are investing in the technology you are investing it as a store of value you are investing in digital property that's what cryptocurrencies are that's what bitcoin is [Music] china has banned bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies once again today i want to share my insights about it but you know what's very very interesting especially for those who have been in the cryptocurrency markets for quite some time already china has been banning cryptocurrencies every single year so please do remember this that from now 2021 and over the next few years you will see this over and over and over and over you would see that as a narrative that over and over that they will try their best to ban and create as much fear and certainty and doubt toward bitcoin please do remember that the drop that we had somewhere april and may 2021 was mainly because they banned crypto mining which in my opinion is very good for bitcoin in general for bitcoin to progress in the future because what it actually did was there were a lot of miners in china and the thing about that is this it's somehow not concentrated a lot of the mining in that particular area banning the mining of bitcoin in china pushed bitcoin mining to be decentralized even more it pushed bitcoin mining that we have a lot of bitcoin miners moving into western shores moving outside china true the hash rate actually went down but if you've been tracking it over the past few months we've been seeing hash rates steadily start to go up again and actually get better which is showing us that hey miners are actually going out miners are actually setting up shop elsewhere please do remember this that china has been banning bitcoin every single year but if you look at it it only brings the price down it causes price action downward but here's the thing every time they try to ban bitcoin if you've noticed it adoption is getting bigger better and stronger if you notice it also there's actually more people using bitcoin wallets right now than ever before this has been happening every single year so why am i saying this one of the things that causes people to get scared is when they see news items like that and true enough china is one of the largest economies in the world what china does creates an onslaught of sentiment in not just the capital market but also the crypto market as well but here's what you need to remember aside from adoption aside from more and more people using bitcoin more than ever please do remember this that whatever is thrown out there whatever fear uncertainty and doubt that's thrown out there it doesn't change the technology of bitcoin bitcoin is bitcoin whatever is thrown out there it just brings prices down if it's negative but it doesn't change the technology please always remember this that when you invest in cryptocurrencies especially bitcoin you are not investing it as a medium of exchange you are investing in the technology you are investing it as a store of value you are investing in digital property what bitcoin is and all of this news that you see does not change any of its value now why am i saying this if you are a long-term investor you are a hodler you are a person who believes in its technology then why should you be scared why should be this drop be an avenue for you to be fearful they've been doing this over and over but if you notice it for you to be able to shut down bitcoin because bitcoin is decentralized there's no central authority who owns bitcoin the only way for you to shut down bitcoin is you shut down the internet and it's not possible has been doing this over and over and over and over but one thing has been sure nothing has happened in order for bitcoin to be stopped it has been growing and it has become even bigger better and stronger the past few days i saw it on twitter lightning network is a layer 2 scaling solution that allows bitcoin to be transacted in a faster way that's off chain and what's interesting about that is this so lightning makes transfers of bitcoin not just faster but also cheaper never in our entire history have we seen the ability to do border transactions payments and deposits at a very very fast way please remember that time and memorial if you're sending money from manila to the us it would take days before it would arrive in your account it would even entail you going to a mall for you to be able to send it and also for you to actually receive it we now have bitcoin that allows you to send your asset at a very very fast way cross-border in a very very efficient manner but in the whole cryptocurrency space bitcoin is the slowest since it's doing a proof-of-work consensus mechanism it's more expensive and the lightning network makes it faster the lightning network makes it cheaper the lighting network makes it scalable transfers could be done in seconds but what's so interesting about that is strike along with the lighting network and along with twitter now allows you to send money via twitter via the lightning network via strike instantaneously and for free and not a lot of people are talking about it a lot of people are talking about the fun a lot of people are talking about the fear uncertainty and doubt that's caused by china but what people don't see is what's being done by bitcoin to help make lives bigger to help make lives better for all of us there's over 30 plus billion us dollars that's being remitted that's a large amount of money imagine the savings that every filipino household every ofw would get when they start sending their money using the lightning network using cryptocurrencies imagine their ability to be able to transfer without any fees that i think is revolutionary that i think is changing the game that i think is changing the way we would live and see finance in general instead of focusing on the fear instead of focusing on the uncertainty instead of focusing on the doubt focus on the technology focus on what bitcoin is doing to make things better focus on how it can be a store of value that it's easy now for anyone to have a chance to own digital property to store value to have something that they have full custody over that no one can take it away from you that's what bitcoin does if you're a huddler if you're a long-term investor and you believe in the technology drops like this can be an opportunity for you to stack drops like this can be an opportunity for you also to buy it at a much lower price everyone wants to buy when it's exciting and if you remember last april last may the prices were high but everyone was buying but if you notice it the strength in all of this is when you buy it when it's cheap when you buy it when it's low you find something superior you accumulate it and you hold it over a stretch period of time and that's
